profile.name: Aisha Rahman
profile.title: Business Analyst
profile.bio: Business Analyst with 4+ years turning ambiguous problems into clear decisions. I connect stakeholder needs to data — building requirements, dashboards, and analyses that improve product and operational outcomes. I bring a calm, structured approach and a bias toward measurable impact.
